channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Test du Dell XPS 14 (2026) : toujours bon, mais plus vraiment remarquable
item.description: Dell l'a bien compris malgré ses nouvelles gammes : sa star, c'est le XPS. Voici donc le Dell XPS 14 de 2026, de retour avec Panther Lake.

item.title: Les utilisateurs de la PS5 respirent avec cette réduction de 70 euros sur ce SSD d’1 To
item.description: Le Crucial P310 remplit les conditions attendues par Sony pour pouvoir être compatible avec la PS5. Grâce à lui, votre console gagne 1 To de stockage supplémentaire. En ce moment, le SSD est disponible pour 129,99 euros au lieu de 199,99 euros.

item.title: CyberGhost VPN à -85 % pour la fête des Mères : un tarif jamais vu pour protéger sa navigation (et bien plus) [Sponso]
item.description: Les VPN sont utiles à tous, y compris à votre mère. Alors pourquoi ne pas surprendre la vôtre en lui offrant un abonnement à CyberGhost VPN pour la fête des Mères ? Celui-ci profite en ce moment d’une remise inédite de 85 %.

item.title: The Canvas Hack Is a New Kind of Ransomware Debacle
item.description: Thousands of schools around the US were paralyzed on Thursday after education tech firm Instructure shut down access to its Canvas platform following a breach by hackers going by the name ShinyHunters.

item.title: 50% Off DoorDash Promo Code | May 2026
item.description: Explore today’s top DoorDash promo codes for $25 off your first order, free delivery, and 50% off DashPass for students and select users.

item.title: How to watch 'RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars S11' — 18 queens face off for a spot in the Drag Race Hall of Fame
item.description: Eighteen returning queens, three competitive brackets and a two-episode premiere. Here's how to watch RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars S11 online, including its release schedule and global streaming rollout.

item.title: Parents might be your best employees
item.description: Great performance is about prioritization and ownership: skills working parents have in abundance. My hiring philosophy is quite simple: find people who raise the bar. In practice, many of those people turn out to be parents.

item.title: Researchers asked moms what they really want for Mother’s Day. The answer is heartbreaking
item.description: Researchers at Rutgers Center for Women in Business and asked 288 mothers to choose their ideal Mother’s Day gift. Mother’s Day is Sunday, and it’s not too late to get that perfect gift for Mom–time for herself.

item.title: J’ai testé la Huawei Watch Fit 5 Pro, aussi précise qu’une montre de sport, le poids et le prix en moins
item.description: Avec sa Watch Fit 5 Pro, Huawei propose une montre légère et relativement accessible, mais au suivi particulièrement efficace. Voici son test complet.

item.title: Why you can never get your doctor to call you back
item.description: Like many AI companies automating work that humans currently do, Basata will eventually face a harder question about where the line is between augmenting workers and displacing them. For now, the founders say the administrative staff they work with aren't worried about that; they're more worried about drowning.

item.title: 5 free, pro-level PC and Mac apps to replace your paid subscriptions
item.description: Subscription fatigue is real. Beat it with these excellent alternatives to apps from Adobe, Microsoft, and others. If you’re like me, your bank statement looks like a graveyard of monthly $9.99 charges for apps and web services that somehow add up to the price of a used Honda Civic every year.
